author: Xbox YouTube
text:
STARSEEKER: Astroneer Expeditions - Launch Trailer
Join the ESS Starseeker crew to explore strange new worlds and work together with friends. Complete planet-wide objectives on timed Expeditions before returning to safety aboard the Station. Collect and unlock powerful tech to help the crew tackle the perils of space!

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/starseeker-astroneer-expeditions/9NTZH69PZSH0/

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Fable - Gameplay Demo | Build an Extraordinary Life
Step into Albion and find out what it means to build an extraordinary life.
 
This extended gameplay demo dives into the heart of Fable's living population - a systemic, interconnected game-within-a-game. Charm your way into friendships, raise a family, or chase wealth, power and prestige as you venture across Albion. Or why not all of the above?

Fable launches on February 23, 2027. Become the Hero you want to be in an immersive open-world action-RPG where each choice shapes your journey, reputation is everything, and fairytale endings are never guaranteed.

✨ Pre-Order now to receive the Pre-Order Content Pack, featuring the questionably heroic Chicken Suit and a collection of charming in-game gifts:

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/fable/9pmn4dgrt1ln

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
State of Decay 3 Games Showcase Deep Dive | Official XBOX Podcast
On this episode of the Official XBOX Podcast, we're at Undead Labs and diving deep into a horde of information about State of Decay 3. We're talking about the Games Showcase trailer, what you may have missed, and giving you a ton of behind the scenes information about the open-world zombie survival game.

00:00 Introduction
01:05 How would you explain State of Decay 3 to a person playing for the first time?
03:34 What does community mean to the team and in the game""
05:25 What was the process like creating this trailer for Showcase?
08:56 What's the story behind the song choice?
13:26 What gameplay mechanics did you want to focus on in the trailer?
14:35 Multiplayer and Alpha testing
18:18 SUV and new vehicles
21:06 New outfits
23:18 Locations, settlements, and weather
25:59 Caroliine
27:08 Weather systems
27:59 Zombies, Ferals, Bloaters, and Plague Nests, oh my!
34:15 What are you most excited for players to experience in SD3?
39:23 Outro

Listen to us on Spotify/Apple Podcasts 🎧 
https://podcasters.spotify.com/pod/show/officialxboxpodcast

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Cyclops | Character Reveal Trailer | Marvel Rivals
As a founding member of the X-Men, Scott Summers is no stranger to hardship and discipline. Having overcome discrimination and tribulation, he stands as an unyielding protector of Mutantkind.

Through his specialized ruby quartz visor, he's able to precisely control the devastating force channeled through his eyes, neutralizing any threat on the battlefield.

Cross him and all restraint disappears, unleashing an unstoppable torrent of concussive energy!

Cyclops arrives with Season 8.5 of Marvel Rivals on June 12th!  💥

https://www.xbox.com/games/store/marvel-rivals/9n8pmw7qmd3d

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Frog Sqwad 🐸 - Launch Trailer
Frog Sqwad 🐸 is launching on XBOX Series X|S and XBOX One.

Step into the Sewers and experience Frog Sqwad 🐸's world for the very first time on XBOX. Whether you're here for co-operative chaos, making sure the Swamp King is fed, or just the cool cosmetics, this launch trailer gives you a first look at what awaits.

Available now on XBOX: https://www.xbox.com/games/store/frog-sqwad/9N16RZ0S50V2 

Key Features!
- Better Together in the Sewers - Head into The Sewers together, gather what you can, and make your way back as a team however that ends up looking.
- Quota, Sorted - Bring back enough food to hit the day’s quota and keep the Swamp King content, unlocking what comes next for your group.
- If It Exists, Use It - Experiment with anything you find. Stack, pull, and improvise your way through each run.
- Say Hello to the Locals - The Sewers are full of strange little inhabitants who add just the right amount of disruption.
- Big Frog Energy - The more you eat, the bigger you become, until you’re rolling through the world as a booming Megafrog.
- Tiny Frog, Big Help Needed - Drop your food when you take a hit, and you’ll shrink into a tiny frogspawn! Ready for a helping hand from your team.
- Say It Out Loud - Talk naturally as you play, your frog’s mouth moving along with every laugh and shout shared in the moment.

SUBSCRIBE TO XBOX: https://xbx.lv/2EEjmaR
